messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0015",
  "title": "女性游戏玩家数量迅速增长 推动市场新一轮拓展与创新",
  "page_index": 6,
  "page_range": "6"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0016",
    "title": "图表类型",
    "page_range": "6",
    "summary": "This section answers questions regarding the data visualization formats and their corresponding metrics. It specifies that bar charts represent the number of mobile internet users in China (unit: 100 million) and line charts represent the month-on-month growth rate (unit: %). It enables retrieval of information on chart types, tracked entities, specific metrics, measurement units, and the visual evidence format used for presenting Chinese mobile internet user data. It does not contain dates, procedures, or standalone textual claims."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0017",
    "title": "主要信息与数据趋势",
    "page_range": "6",
    "summary": "This section provides quantitative time-series data tracking internet user population and growth rates from December 2021 to June 2025 at six-month intervals. It supports retrieval for questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Entities**: Internet user (网民) demographic trends and digital adoption metrics.\n- **Dates**: Specific half-year checkpoints: Dec 2021, Jun 2022, Dec 2022, Jun 2023, Dec 2023, Jun 2024, Dec 2024, and Jun 2025.\n- **Metrics**: Exact user counts (in 100 millions, ranging from 10.29 to 11.16) and period-over-period growth rates (in %, ranging from 0.46% to 1.75%).\n- **Claims**: The internet user base demonstrates a consistent upward trajectory, with growth rates fluctuating but remaining strictly positive across all intervals, indicating continuous expansion.\n- **Evidence Types**: Structured numerical data points and calculated percentage growth rates.\n- **Other Categories**: No definitions, procedures, tables, or figures are explicitly referenced in this section."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0018",
    "title": "总结",
    "page_range": "6-1",
    "summary": "This section answers retrieval queries regarding China's internet user demographics, device adoption, and mobile gaming market scale. Specifically, it addresses:\n- **Topics & Claims:** Trends in China's mobile internet user growth (steady expansion with positive but fluctuating rates) and the overwhelming dominance of mobile devices for internet access in 2025.\n- **Metrics & Dates:** Mobile internet users increased from 1.029 billion (Dec 2021) to 1.116 billion (Jun 2025). 2025 device usage rates: mobile phones (99.4%), desktop PCs (32.3%), laptops (30.9%), tablets (29.6%), TVs (24.5%). China's mobile game player population is estimated at 790–830 million.\n- **Entities:** China (mainland), CNNIC (China Internet Network Information Center), Diandian Data, mobile phones, desktop PCs, laptops, tablets, televisions.\n- **Figures & Tables:** References a trend chart illustrating user growth and growth rate fluctuations, and a bar chart displaying 2025 device usage percentages.\n- **Evidence Types & Procedures:** User counts sourced from CNNIC's periodic statistical reports. Game user penetration derived from Diandian Data, corporate financial reports, expert interviews, and calculated via Diandian's statistical model. Notes specify mainland China coverage and potential data adjustments in 2026 reports.\n- **Definitions/Scope:** Clarifies that game user statistics encompass the total mainland China user base."
  }
]

message.content: This section provides a retrieval-oriented overview of China’s mobile internet user expansion, device adoption trends, and mobile gaming market scale, contextualized under the parent theme of female player growth driving market innovation. It covers **topics** including demographic internet adoption, digital device penetration, and mobile gaming player base estimation. Key **entities** include mainland China, CNNIC, Diandian Data, and device categories (mobile phones, desktop PCs, laptops, tablets, televisions). The **dates** span six-month intervals from December 2021 to June 2025, with specific 2025 benchmarks. Core **metrics** track mobile internet users growing from 1.029 billion to 1.116 billion, period-over-period growth rates between 0.46% and 1.75%, 2025 device access rates (mobile phones: 99.4%, desktop PCs: 32.3%, laptops: 30.9%, tablets: 29.6%, TVs: 24.5%), and an estimated mobile game player population of 790–830 million. The primary **claims** assert a consistent upward trajectory in internet adoption with strictly positive but fluctuating growth rates, alongside the overwhelming dominance of mobile devices for online access. **Figures** include a combined trend chart (bar and line formats) visualizing user counts and growth rate fluctuations, and a bar chart displaying 2025 device usage percentages; no standalone tables are referenced. **Evidence types** comprise structured numerical data, CNNIC periodic statistical reports, Diandian Data, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews. **Procedures** involve data derivation via Diandian’s statistical model and cross-referencing with financial and survey sources. **Definitions** clarify that game user statistics encompass the total mainland China user base, with scope notes indicating potential data adjustments in 2026 reports.
